content.question: If the current government loses electoral authority and a new coalition takes power, how likely is reversal of the 2013 centralization settlement, and what institutional changes would be necessary to re-empower municipalities or create alternative governance structures for village schools?
content.reduction_path: Conduct scenario modeling of post-2026 electoral outcomes; identify opposition parties' stated positions on educational decentralization; gather historical precedent from 1998-2002 transition (previous government change) on education-policy reversals.
